imsmd:description.imsmd:langstring: Solve whole number division problems such as 157/6. Use a partitioning tool to help solve randomly generated division problems. Learn strategies to do complex arithmetic in your head. Split a division problem into parts that are easy to work with. This learning object is one in a series of four objects.

tlf:keylearningobjective.tlf:langstring: Students use known division facts to solve division problems.
Students use multiplicative partitioning strategies to solve division problems.

tlf:educationalvalue.tlf:langstring: Students use multiplicative strategies to solve division problems with whole number remainders.
Students recall multiplication and division facts.
Random generation of division problems supports repeated use.
Times tables can be looked up during learning activities.

tlf:rights.tlf:langstring: Copyright Curriculum Corporation. This material solely contains TLF Content. Refer to Conditions of Use.

item.title: Start: The divider: whole number remainders
